review_text: This was the worst delivery experience ever. I am extremely disappointed and will never order again.
The product quality is decent but the packaging could be improved.
Absolutely loved it! The support team was fast, polite and solved everything perfectly.
The app is okay. It works, but the interface feels average and confusing sometimes.
I hate how slow the service is. This is unacceptable and frustrating.
Good experience overall, but not extraordinary.
